_comment: Golden set for `npm run eval`. Each item is a requirement you already understand well, plus the coverage you'd expect a good QA engineer to produce. `expectAreas` are keywords/topics that should appear across the generated scenarios (case-insensitive substring match). Replace these with YOUR real requirements + expected coverage — the score is only as meaningful as this set.

items.name: Login with lockout
items.requirement: As a registered user I can log in with email and password. Invalid credentials show an error. After 5 failed attempts the account locks for 15 minutes. Passwords are case-sensitive.

items.name: File upload
items.requirement: Users can upload a profile picture. Allowed types: PNG, JPG. Max size 5 MB. Uploading an unsupported type or an oversized file shows a validation message. Upload can be cancelled mid-way.

items.name: Search with pagination
items.requirement: A search box returns matching products. Results are paginated 20 per page. No matches shows an empty state. Search is case-insensitive and trims whitespace. Special characters must not break the query.
